block_00: 🎂You're in for the birthday ticket competition!
block_05: Get a ticket for each $10 turnover and get an opportunity to win a share of $25,000
block_07: We are excited to invite you to our ticket competition! By trading on your real balance, you can earn unique tickets that will enter you into the raffle. You will get a chance to top up your real account at our expense in honor of the company’s birthday!
block_08: The competition will start on November 27 at 7 am UTC and finish on December 7 at 7 am UTC. Every weekday we will give away 50 tickets for the prize amount of $30 each; over the weekend, 60 tickets for $50 each; and at the end of the trading competition, there will be a grand drawing of 100 tickets for $100 each. Anyone can become a winner!
block_09: A total of $25,000 will be up for grabs! Don't miss your chance!
block_10: Meanwhile, there is time before the start of this event to practice trading on your demo or real account!
